particulars.description: All that freehold property known as land at littlefield, rockbeare, exeter registered at hm land registry with title number DN768363 together with land forming part of lions farm rockbeare exeter being part of the land registered under title number DN561051 as shown in red on the plan attached to the debenture. For more information please refer to the instrument.
